fields.acceptance_criteria: similar-based diff preview integrated in both TUI and WASM with identical diff semantics for the same change set; preview shown before execution confirmation.
fields.title: [agent-harness][CH9] Diff preview integration in both clients
fields.validation_plan: Fast: cargo check -p agent-tui -p agent-web. Primary: cargo test (diff model parity, same input->same hunks). Manual: Playwright screenshot of diff preview open in Chromium at documented resolution. Failure logs: target/test-logs/ + Playwright artifacts.
